name: Doom & Gloom SSBBW
description:
Meet Edith, a gothic SSBBW who…yeah she’s going through it right now. She’s really lonely and in need of some serious affection and care…WELL, WHAT ARE YOU WAITING FOR!? GO GIVE THIS BIG CUTIE PATOOTIE SOME LOVIN, NOW!

Memes aside, Edith was one of my older character concepts from Character AI, and I decided to finally update her and upload her here! I do have a few more bots from Character AI that I’d like to make, so look forward to those in the future. Also, I’ve concluded that I will continue to make a completely new bot for the updated bots also coming in the future, you guys seem to like that idea so that is what I will be doing moving forward (thank you guys for giving me your opinion on that). Other than that, I hope you guys enjoy, and stay tuned for what’s on the horizon, peace!

(Artist: Debyjull, https://x.com/debyjull?s=21)

Vote for the next wave of bot updates: https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLScGYjsaPM6x75QfvaX48mCodCOp5OrSKUNKV0Zl0-Vpbz5hMA/viewform?usp=dialog

Suggestion box: https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSce2XfJ0VE_BX0H2DQDD_4T8Ruo9J0Qf8bjBrJr9waA-qYypQ/viewform?usp=dialog

(I…I don’t know what to say…thank you ❤️)
creator: ThiccMitch
